plugins.name: arxiv-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search arXiv, fetch paper metadata, and read full-text content via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: astronomy-mcp-server
plugins.description: What's in the sky, computed offline — planet and moon positions, rise/set, phases, eclipses, and seasons for any place and time.

plugins.name: attack-surface-mcp-server
plugins.description: Passive external attack-surface mapping: CT subdomains, DNS, TLS, HTTP posture, RDAP/WHOIS, Shodan.

plugins.name: aviation-weather-mcp-server
plugins.description: Fetch METARs, TAFs, PIREPs, and SIGMETs/AIRMETs from the NWS Aviation Weather Center via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: biorxiv-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search and retrieve bioRxiv and medRxiv preprints — by DOI, date interval, or keyword — via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: bls-labor-mcp-server
plugins.description: Fetch US Bureau of Labor Statistics data — CPI, unemployment, wages, JOLTS, and more via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: bluesky-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search posts, profiles, feeds, threads, and trending topics on Bluesky via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: brapi-mcp-server
plugins.description: A collaborative BrAPI v2.1 workspace for multi-agent research via MCP. Search studies, germplasm, genotypes, & more - across Breedbase, T3, Sweetpotatobase, & any BrAPI v2-compliant server.

plugins.name: calculator-mcp-server
plugins.description: Evaluate, simplify, and differentiate mathematical expressions via MCP.

plugins.name: cdc-health-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search and query CDC public health data — mortality, vaccinations, surveillance, behavioral risk (Socrata SODA API) via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: census-mcp-server
plugins.description: Query U.S. Census Bureau data, variables, and geography via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: chembl-mcp-server
plugins.description: Link compounds to protein targets, rank bioactivity, and look up drug mechanisms and indications.

plugins.name: clinicaltrialsgov-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search ClinicalTrials.gov trials, retrieve study details and results, and match patients to eligible trials via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: clipboard-mcp-server
plugins.description: Read, write, and inspect the system clipboard across macOS, Linux (X11/Wayland), and Windows via MCP.

plugins.name: coingecko-mcp-server
plugins.description: Market data for 15,000+ cryptocurrencies — prices, history, trends, and deep coin metadata via CoinGecko.

plugins.name: congressgov-mcp-server
plugins.description: Access U.S. congressional data - bills, votes, members, committees - through MCP. STDIO & Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: courtlistener-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search and retrieve US court opinions, federal dockets, judge records, citation networks, and oral arguments from CourtListener's 9M+ opinion corpus via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: cpsc-recalls-mcp-server
plugins.description: MCP server for US consumer product recalls from the Consumer Product Safety Commission — hazards, remedies, and affected products.

plugins.name: crossref-mcp-server
plugins.description: Resolve DOIs, search ~155M scholarly works, and fetch references via the Crossref REST API. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: devops-status-mcp-server
plugins.description: Check vendor status pages, inspect SSL/TLS certificates, verify DNS propagation, and get incident-response playbooks.

plugins.name: docgen-mcp-server
plugins.description: Render HTML/markdown to PDF, export rows to xlsx, and fill AcroForm PDFs via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: earthquake-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search USGS and EMSC seismic data — real-time feeds, event queries, and earthquake counts via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: eia-energy-mcp-server
plugins.description: Browse and query the U.S. Energy Information Administration API v2 — electricity, petroleum, natural gas, coal, forecasts, and more via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: ensembl-mcp-server
plugins.description: Look up genes, fetch sequences, predict variant consequences, find orthologs and cross-database xrefs via Ensembl REST via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: eur-lex-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search EU legislation, CJEU case law, and treaties; traverse the CELLAR relationship graph; resolve EuroVoc concepts via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: eurostat-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search and query 8,933 Eurostat datasets — EU economy, demography, trade, health, and NUTS regional data via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: evals-mcp-server
plugins.description: Author verifiable eval records through a draft → review → revise → submit loop with server-enforced graders; compile to JSONL/CSV/Inspect/lm-eval via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: exchange-rates-mcp-server
plugins.description: Convert currencies, get FX rates, and query historical ECB exchange rate data via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: faa-aircraft-registry-mcp-server
plugins.description: Decode N-numbers to aircraft, engine, status, and owner, and search the US civil aircraft registry by owner, type, or state — offline, keyless.

plugins.name: faostat-mcp-server
plugins.description: Global food & agriculture statistics from the UN FAOSTAT bulk-download corpus, served from a local SQLite mirror with a DataCanvas SQL surface, over MCP. STDIO & Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: fcc-broadband-mcp-server
plugins.description: Access FCC broadband availability, coverage analysis, and digital divide data for US geographies and census blocks via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: federal-regulations-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search and trace US federal rules across the Federal Register (proposed/final rules and notices), the eCFR (codified, point-in-time CFR full text, locally mirrored), and Regulations.gov (rulemaking dockets and public comments) via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: fema-mcp-server
plugins.description: Query FEMA disaster declarations, public assistance grants, housing aid, and NFIP flood insurance claims via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: finnhub-mcp-server
plugins.description: Real-time US-equity quotes, company fundamentals, earnings, analyst trends, and news via Finnhub.

plugins.name: gbif-biodiversity-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search GBIF species taxonomy, occurrence records, datasets, and publishers via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: gdelt-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search and analyze global news coverage and US TV transcripts via the GDELT Project APIs.

plugins.name: gnomad-genetics-mcp-server
plugins.description: Look up variant allele frequencies by ancestry, gene loss-of-function constraint, gene variant lists, and sequencing coverage over gnomAD — with ClinVar significance joined in.

plugins.name: guardian-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search, browse, and retrieve full article text from The Guardian's journalism archive (1999–present) via MCP.

plugins.name: gutenberg-mcp-server
plugins.description: MCP server for Project Gutenberg — 75,000+ public-domain ebooks, searchable with full plain-text retrieval.

plugins.name: hn-mcp-server
plugins.description: Browse Hacker News feeds, threads, and user profiles with full-text search via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: imf-mcp-server
plugins.description: Query IMF SDMX 3.0 macroeconomic data — 193 dataflows, 190 countries, WEO projections, BOP, CPI, exchange rates, and national accounts via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: libofcongress-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search LOC digital collections, browse Chronicling America newspapers with full OCR text, and look up LC Subject Headings via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: macos-mcp-server
plugins.description: Control macOS system settings, apps, windows, audio, displays, screenshots, and Focus mode via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: mailchimp-mcp-server
plugins.description: Draft, test, and send Mailchimp campaigns straight from your MCP client — with audience management, subscriber CRUD, and post-send analytics behind safe-by-default send gates. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: medical-codes-mcp-server
plugins.description: Decode, search, validate, and crosswalk US medical codes — ICD-10-CM, ICD-10-PCS, HCPCS Level II, RxNorm — over a bundled offline index.

plugins.name: met-museum-mcp-server
plugins.description: MCP server for The Metropolitan Museum of Art collection — 500K+ artworks with metadata, provenance, and open-access high-res images.

plugins.name: musicbrainz-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search artists, releases, recordings, works, and labels; traverse relationships; resolve ISRC/ISWC/barcode; fetch cover art via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: national-parks-mcp-server
plugins.description: Plan US National Park Service trips — find parks, check alerts and closures, find campgrounds, browse things to do and events via the NPS Data API.

plugins.name: nhtsa-vehicle-safety-mcp-server
plugins.description: Decode VINs, search recalls, complaints, crash ratings, and investigations via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: nist-nvd-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search and audit CVEs by keyword, severity, CWE, CISA KEV status, and CPE via the NIST National Vulnerability Database. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: noaa-climate-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search NOAA climate stations and datasets, fetch historical weather observations via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: noaa-marine-mcp-server
plugins.description: Find NOAA tide stations and NDBC buoys, fetch tide predictions, water levels, tidal currents, and live buoy conditions via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: noaa-spaceweather-mcp-server
plugins.description: Query NOAA SWPC space weather: geomagnetic storm scales, Kp index, aurora forecasts, solar wind, solar activity, and alerts via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: nonprofit-explorer-mcp-server
plugins.description: MCP server for US nonprofit financials via ProPublica — IRS Form 990 data for 1.8M+ tax-exempt organizations.

plugins.name: npi-providers-mcp-server
plugins.description: Look up US healthcare providers in the NPPES NPI registry and resolve NUCC specialty codes.

plugins.name: ntfy-mcp-server
plugins.description: Send, manage, and replay ntfy push notifications via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: nws-weather-mcp-server
plugins.description: Get US weather forecasts, active alerts, and current observations via the National Weather Service API. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: obsidian-mcp-server
plugins.description: Read, write, search, and surgically edit Obsidian vault notes, tags, and frontmatter via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: onebusaway-mcp-server
plugins.description: Query stops, routes, real-time arrivals, vehicle positions, and schedules from OneBusAway transit APIs via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: openalex-mcp-server
plugins.description: Access the OpenAlex academic research catalog - 270M+ publications through MCP. STDIO & Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: openaq-mcp-server
plugins.description: Find air-quality monitoring stations and read measured pollutant observations (PM2.5, PM10, O3, NO2, SO2, CO, and more) from government monitors worldwide via the OpenAQ v3 API, with DataCanvas SQL over historical series.

plugins.name: openchargemap-mcp-server
plugins.description: Find EV charging stations worldwide by location and connector via the global Open Charge Map registry — full station detail, reference-ID resolution, and community reliability check-ins via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: openfda-mcp-server
plugins.description: Query FDA data on drugs, food, devices, and recalls via openFDA. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: openfec-mcp-server
plugins.description: Access FEC campaign finance data through MCP. Query data about candidates, money trails, and election filings. STDIO & Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: openfoodfacts-mcp-server
plugins.description: Look up food products by barcode, search by ingredient or nutrition filter, compare products side-by-side, and browse the canonical tag vocabulary via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: openlibrary-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search books and authors, fetch editions, browse subjects, and resolve cover images from Open Library via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: open-meteo-mcp-server
plugins.description: Geocode places, fetch global weather forecasts, ERA5 historical climate, marine conditions, air quality, and terrain elevation via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: openstates-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search bills, legislators, committees, and events across all 50 US states, DC, and Puerto Rico via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: openstreetmap-mcp-server
plugins.description: Geocode, reverse geocode, and run Overpass spatial queries on OpenStreetMap data via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: orcid-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search and retrieve researcher profiles, works, affiliations, funding, and peer review records from the ORCID registry via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: osv-advisory-mcp-server
plugins.description: Query OSV.dev for package vulnerabilities, batch-audit dependency lists, and fetch full advisory records via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: ourairports-mcp-server
plugins.description: Resolve airport codes (IATA/ICAO/GPS/local), search airports, find the nearest by coordinate, and look up runways, navaids, and radio frequencies from the bundled public-domain OurAirports dataset via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: paleobiology-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search fossil occurrences, taxon ranges, diversity through deep time, and the geologic time scale.

plugins.name: pentest-mcp-server
plugins.description: Offline methodology engine and payload workshop for authorized penetration testing, CTF, security research, and education.

plugins.name: pixoo-mcp-server
plugins.description: Render and push styled pixel art, text, dashboards, and animations to Divoom Pixoo LED displays on your local network via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: pokeapi-mcp-server
plugins.description: Look up Pokémon, moves, abilities, items, natures, and type matchups from PokéAPI v2 via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: protein-mcp-server
plugins.description: Federated protein structure & annotation across experimental (PDB) and predicted (AlphaFold) models.

plugins.name: pubchem-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search the PubChem chemical database for compounds, properties, safety data, bioactivity, cross-references, and entity summaries via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: pubmed-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search PubMed/Europe PMC, fetch articles and full text (PMC/EPMC/Unpaywall), citations, MeSH terms.

plugins.name: reference-data-mcp-server
plugins.description: Look up countries, timezones, periodic table elements, physical constants, units, HTTP status codes, and MIME types via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: reliefweb-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search ReliefWeb humanitarian reports, disasters, jobs, training, and country profiles via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: sanctions-screening-mcp-server
plugins.description: Screen names against the consolidated OFAC, EU, UK, and UN sanctions lists and resolve legal entities against GLEIF, fuzzy-matched offline over a local SQLite + FTS5 mirror. A screening aid, not a compliance determination.

plugins.name: secedgar-mcp-server
plugins.description: Query SEC EDGAR filings, XBRL financials, and company data through MCP. STDIO & Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: seerr-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search Jellyseerr/Overseerr, check availability, and create guarded media requests.

plugins.name: smithsonian-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search and explore 19.4 million Smithsonian Open Access museum objects, retrieve CC0 media, and discover cross-collection connections via MCP.

plugins.name: socrata-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search and query government open-data portals (Socrata SODA API) via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: stackexchange-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search Stack Exchange questions, fetch Q&A threads as markdown, look up tag FAQs and user profiles.

plugins.name: tmdb-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search movies, TV, and people on The Movie Database (TMDB) — credits, ratings, trailers, images, recommendations, and region-aware streaming availability via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: toolkit-mcp-server
plugins.description: Fast developer utilities — random ID generation, QR codes, IP geolocation, hashing, and encoding — plus gated, fail-closed network and system diagnostics.

plugins.name: transitland-mcp-server
plugins.description: Global transit data via the Transitland v2 registry — operators, GTFS/GTFS-RT/GBFS feeds with license terms, routes, stops, and real-time-aware departures via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: treasury-fiscaldata-mcp-server
plugins.description: MCP server for US Treasury Fiscal Data — national debt, interest rates, exchange rates, and federal revenue/spending.

plugins.name: uniprot-mcp-server
plugins.description: Protein research over UniProtKB — search by function, fetch curated records, map IDs, proteomes.

plugins.name: usaspending-mcp-server
plugins.description: Access US federal award, recipient, agency, and spending analytics data from USAspending.gov via MCP.

plugins.name: usgs-water-mcp-server
plugins.description: Query real-time and historical water data from ~8,000 USGS stream gages and groundwater wells via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: who-gho-mcp-server
plugins.description: Query WHO Global Health Observatory data — 3,059 indicators across 194 member states with country, region, year, and sex filters via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: wikidata-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search and fetch Wikidata entities, execute SPARQL queries, and resolve external identifiers via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: wikipedia-mcp-server
plugins.description: Search Wikipedia articles, read summaries and full text, target sections, find nearby pages, and list language editions via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: workflows-mcp-server
plugins.description: Store, query, and create YAML workflow playbooks for LLM agents via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: worldbank-mcp-server
plugins.description: Query 29,500+ World Bank development indicators for 200+ countries across 60+ years via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.

plugins.name: wsdot-mcp-server
plugins.description: Query WA highway conditions, ferry schedules, vessel locations, toll rates, border waits, and alerts via MCP. STDIO or Streamable HTTP.
